exclusive_sections:
MSAJCE  Mohamed Sathak A.J. College of Engineering
Transport  Complete Data Extract for RAG Model
Source URL: https://www.msajce-edu.in/transport.php | Includes: Main page + 9 Bus Route PDFs (AR3 AR10, R22)
Scraped: 2026-04-27 | Chunks: 12 | Token Target: 500 | Overlap: 100 | Model: text-embedding-3-small
1. College Bus Facility  Overview & General Information
Chunk ID: msajce_page_04_chunk_01 | URL: https://www.msajce-edu.in/transport.php
The College is easily accessible from Chennai Central Railway Station, Tambaram Railway Station and CMDA Bus Station by
the state operated transport service. In addition, the College provides its own transportation for students and staff residing in and
around the campus.
Fleet Count
Buses 22
Tata ACE 1
Ambulance 1
Service Area: Chennai, Chengalpattu, Kanchipuram and Thiruvallur districts  available on all working days.
Uses of Bus Facility:
(cid:127) Daily commute for students and staff
(cid:127) Local social service activities
(cid:127) Sports activities
(cid:127) NCC / NSS activities
(cid:127) Placement and Training activities
(cid:127) Industrial visits
(cid:127) Educational trips
Transport Committee: A committee headed by a Convener manages smooth bus operations. One teaching and one supporting
staff are in-charge of each bus. The committee meets once every six months; the Principal attends the meeting.

3. College Bus Routes  Summary (All 9 Routes)
Chunk ID: msajce_page_04_chunk_03 | URL: https://www.msajce-edu.in/transport.php
All buses serve MSAJCE, MSAJAA & Nursing students/staff. All buses arrive at MSAJCE College at 8:00 AM.
